title: Bo
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Bo''''' was the name of a group of two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] that carried food away from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] oversaw their exit from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
